headline: SpaceX's Historic $75B IPO, Hawkish Fed, Iran Peace Deal
summary: SpaceX went public in the largest IPO in history, raising $75 billion and vaulting past a $2 trillion market cap. Fed Chair Kevin Warsh signaled rates could go higher. The U.S.-Iran conflict ended, sending oil lower and cruise stocks higher. The S&P 500 logged its 11th winning week in 12.
